caseStudy.title: DriveSoft — Reservation & Ticketing Platform for Srbija Tours
caseStudy.tagline: A production system that runs daily ticket sales and operations for an international bus carrier.
caseStudy.problem: Srbija Tours, an international bus carrier, ran reservations, ticketing and field operations across disconnected, mostly manual tools. They needed one system to sell tickets online, manage routes and passengers, validate tickets, handle payments and fiscal-legal receipts, and give office and field staff a single source of truth.
caseStudy.solution: I built DriveSoft end to end: a Laravel/MySQL backend exposing REST APIs, a React passenger-facing booking site, a React admin panel for operations, and React Native tools for field workers. It covers online reservations, passenger & route management, ticket generation with QR-code validation, payments with fiscal-receipt integration, and operational reporting.
architecture: Backend: Laravel + MySQL, REST APIs, Redis caching, queued background jobs
Frontends: React passenger booking site + React admin panel
Mobile: React Native tools for field workers (ticket validation on the move)
Integrations: online payments, fiscal-receipt (legal) integration, QR-code ticket validation
caseStudy.result: Online reservations, ticketing and back-office operations now run through one maintained platform instead of scattered manual processes — a single source of truth for both the sales desk and field staff.

howIWork.title: AI-assisted development, senior discipline
howIWork.subtitle: I use an AI-assisted workflow to ship faster without lowering the bar. AI accelerates the work; engineering judgment, review and testing keep the code maintainable and correct.

review.title: Disciplined code review
review.description: Every change is read, understood and reviewed before it ships. AI speeds up exploration; it doesn't get a free pass into production.

prompting.title: Precise prompting
prompting.description: I scope problems clearly and direct AI tools deliberately — the same way I'd brief a teammate, with explicit constraints and intent.

testing.title: Verification & testing
testing.description: Generated code is verified against real behavior and covered by tests before it reaches users. Nothing ships unproven.

shipping.title: Faster, reviewable shipping
shipping.description: The result is quicker delivery with clean, maintainable, reviewable code — not throwaway output that someone has to rewrite later.

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.subtitle: Real systems, framed by the problem they solve and the outcome they deliver.

sti-web.title: Srbija Tours — Public Ticket Sales
sti-web.problem: The carrier needed a fast, SEO-friendly public site that could also sell tickets and stay in sync with the booking backend.
sti-web.solution: WordPress frontend for content and SEO speed, backed by a Laravel API for departures, pricing and reservations, with integrated payments and fiscalization; Redis caching and Nginx tuning.
sti-web.result: A public sales channel that loads fast, ranks well, and shares one source of truth with the reservation system.

sti-mobile.title: Srbija Tours — Mobile App (iOS / Android)
sti-mobile.problem: Passengers wanted to search trips and manage accounts and bookings from their phones.
sti-mobile.solution: Cross-platform React Native (Expo) app sharing UI and logic, with offline caching and push notifications.
sti-mobile.result: A published iOS/Android app that extends the booking platform to mobile.

drivesoft-backoffice.title: DriveSoft — Operations Back-office
drivesoft-backoffice.problem: Office staff needed to manage passengers, departures, routes and daily operations without juggling spreadsheets.
drivesoft-backoffice.solution: A Laravel application with role-based access control, audit trail, caching and queues, CSV/Excel import-export, and operational reporting.
drivesoft-backoffice.result: A single internal tool for day-to-day operations, with reports and access control built in.

bozic-konig.title: Božić König — Online Reservations
bozic-konig.problem: A carrier needed an online channel for searching trips and buying tickets.
bozic-konig.solution: A React/Next SPA with optimized search, a clean checkout flow, and back-office integration for routes, departures and pricing.
bozic-konig.result: A focused booking front-end built for UX and performance.

prostor-dereta.title: Prostor Miljenko Dereta — Corporate Site
prostor-dereta.problem: An organization needed a fast, editable site with a blog and space-booking forms.
prostor-dereta.solution: A modern WordPress build with custom templates, optimized images and caching, and an SEO-friendly structure.
prostor-dereta.result: A maintainable corporate site the team can update without a developer.
